title: Flying Frisbees
description: Adds frisbees that can be thrown and played with!
body:
Frisbees that you can throw!

You can catch frisbees that you're facing in your mainhand/offhand/helmetslot, and if you jump on one, you can hitch a ride on it, too! Otherwise, you get smacked.

Frisbees come in the 16 different dye colors.

Frisbees drop themselves as an item instead of despawning when thrown.

[![ModFest: Toybox](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/aa6c3c7b64552dc8e6d37c0677bbe46edbe9a4c7/badge/svg/toybox/compact.svg)
](https://modfest.net/toybox)
